works.lesson: Copper on warm amber = editorial warmth without red aggression. Differentiated from griflan red. Warm temperature intentional throughout.
Cool violet canvas = creative depth. Vermillion accent avoids copper (Forge) and purple (AI). Dual-theme palette with dark/light rhythm. 5.2:1 contrast on accent.
4-neon system with category coding (cyan=PCs, magenta=perifericos, yellow=componentes, lime=CTA). Blue-tinted near-black canvas gives depth. Each neon has 3 glow intensities (sm/md/lg).

Monochromatic green-tinted near-black with warm stone accents. No chromatic accent — color from photography only. Adapted from fluid.glass (#0b1012 blue-tint shifted to #0b100e green-tint for warmth). First project with zero chromatic accent.
Cool blue near-black + burnt clay terracotta creates warm-in-cold tension perfect for minimal dark
Sage green accent on near-black creates organic calm. Sandstone #d4cabb as secondary warms the void.
Electric lime + hot coral on violet-black = playful energy. Three-accent system creates chromatic variety without chaos.

failures.reason: Purple gradient = #1 AI fingerprint. Never use.
